news.t: Leveraged loan defaults hit $25 billion, head for third worst year in history, Goldman

overview.description: The First Trust Senior Loan Fund (FTSL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund holds senior floating rate bank loans from firms around the globe. The actively managed fund can hold up to 20% of assets in non-senior loans, including high-yield bonds and equities. FTSL was launched on May 1, 2013 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Leveraged loan defaults hit $25 billion, head for third worst year in history, Goldman
data.text: Leveraged loan defaults are heading for the third-worst year in history as Federal Reserve interest rate hikes take a toll, according to Goldman Sachs.
